summary: Backend-only regression retest for VidVault /api/analyze. Verified the iteration-2 fix: unreachable .mp4 URL now returns supported=false with a helpful reason. All 8 pytest cases pass (root, mp4 direct supported, html unsupported, empty url 400, missing url field 422, unreachable .mp4 supported=false, ftp bad scheme 400, YouTube short via yt-dlp supported=true with video+audio formats).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py analyze() now correctly gates _classify() on `(mime or size)` in both step-1 (direct-path shortcut) and step-3 (last-ditch fallback). This is the exact fix requested. Regression covered by test_analyze_unreachable_url.

Minor (not a bug): step-3 fallback still calls _classify(mime, ext); when a real .mp4 URL is unreachable, both mime and size are None, so kind is None and we return supported=false with the friendly reason. Good.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fix verified. Public URL from frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL used. 8/8 pytest tests pass in ~3s including YouTube yt-dlp path.
rca_of_issue: N/A - fix already applied by main agent in iteration 3 and verified here.
